channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Clayton leads Florida to NCAA title game, scoring 34 points in 79-73 victory over SEC rival Auburn
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Walter Clayton Jr. is having an NCAA Tournament for the ages. Florida now just needs him to deliver one more time.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Carmelo Anthony and Sue Bird highlight Basketball Hall of Fame class
item.description: Carmelo Anthony and Dwight Howard are going into the Basketball Hall of Fame later this year, not once but twice. And LeBron James and Chris Paul are part of the group that’s headed to the Hall as well, even before their playing careers end.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Fox 5

item.title: The Final Four again has multiple 5th-year starters. This time, it's a farewell to an uncommon era
item.description: “Credit to the NCAA for giving us a year back because that COVID year, that wasn’t real, honestly. Nah, it wasn’t fun at all.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Keanu Tanuvasa, Carsen Ryan go from Utah to BYU
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Last year at this time, Keanu Tanuvasa and Carsen Ryan were both gearing up for Utah's first season in the Big 12 Conference. Now, they're getting ready for Utah's biggest rival.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Pacers run over Jazz in fourth quarter in 140-112 win
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz hung with the Indiana Pacers for three quarters, trailing by just four points going into the fourth. But Indiana outscored Utah in the final quarter, 42-18 en route to a 140-112 win. The Jazz have lost eight in a row and 18 of its last 19 games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicagoland foursome heads to Augusta for Drive, Chip and Putt Finals
item.description: GOLF, Ill. - Mastering golf can take a lifetime. Luckily, these four started early. "When I was like 2, I was holding a plastic club, watching a golf tournament - I don't remember which one," remembered 12-year-old Winnetka native Jack Kemper.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: Padres pick up another win, making for single best start to season ever
item.description: The San Diego Padres have made history after beating the Cleveland Guardians 7-2 at Petco Park on Monday, giving them a five-game winning streak to start the season for the first time ever.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: A's routed by Cubs 18-3 in Sacramento home opener
item.description: WEST SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) -- Carson Kelly hit for the cycle and drove in five runs, Michael Busch launched a two-run homer on the way to a career-high four RBIs, and the Chicago Cubs pounded the Athletics 18-3 on Monday night to spoil their first game in their new Northern California home.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4
